name: 霸總護妻宣言型
description: 男主對外人發出保護妻子的強勢宣言，語氣冰冷有壓迫感。功能是宣示主權、展現男主實力、讓觀眾感受到'被保護'的安全感。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: Let me make this clear one more time. No matter what, G Nanjao is a member of our wrong family. So if you dare lay a finger on her without permission again, even a single hair, I'll make the entire G family pay the price.
